fact: This is placeholder sample content for local development only — the real, curated facts live in Cloudflare KV and are never committed to this repo.
Sample fact #2: swap facts.sample.json for a live KV binding in production; this file exists purely so the site runs and looks right without credentials.
Sample fact #3: each real record in KV follows the same { fact, source_url, domain, why_weird, lane } shape as these placeholders.
why_weird: the schema describing itself is its own example

fact: Sample fact #4: today's fact and the 'another' button both pull one record at a time — never the full list.
Sample fact #5: see README.md for how to load real facts into KV with wrangler kv key put.
